meta.name: SHS Subjective Happiness Scale
meta.description: The SHS is a brief 4-item self-report scale that measures an individual's overall subjective happiness level. It uses a global assessment approach independent of specific sources of happiness and is one of the most widely used measures of happiness.
meta.author: Lyubomirsky & Lepper (1999)
meta.reference: Lyubomirsky S, Lepper HS. A measure of subjective happiness: preliminary reliability and construct validation. Social Indicators Research. 1999;46(2):137-155.
meta.instruction: For each of the following statements, please select the point on the scale that you feel is most appropriate in describing you.

questions.text: Compared to most of my peers, I consider myself:
Some people are generally very happy. They enjoy life regardless of what is going on, getting the most out of everything. To what extent does this characterization describe you?
Some people are generally not very happy. Although they are not depressed, they never seem as happy as they might be. To what extent does this characterization describe you?

ranges.label: Low Happiness
ranges.description: Your subjective happiness level is low. You may be experiencing less joy and satisfaction in daily life.
suggestions: Try focusing on the positive aspects of your life and cultivate a gratitude practice
Increase social interactions with friends and family
Engage in activities that bring you pleasure, such as exercise or hobbies
If persistent unhappiness continues, consider consulting a mental health professional

ranges.label: Moderate Happiness
ranges.description: Your subjective happiness is at a moderate level. You experience some degree of satisfaction and joy in life.
suggestions: Explore new interests and activities to enrich your experiences
Practice mindfulness meditation to enhance present-moment happiness

ranges.label: Moderately High Happiness
ranges.description: Your subjective happiness level is moderately high. You generally experience considerable joy and satisfaction in life.
suggestions: Share your happiness with those around you
Continue pursuing meaningful goals and activities
Cherish and nurture the relationships and activities that bring you happiness

ranges.label: High Happiness
ranges.description: Your subjective happiness level is very high. You generally feel very satisfied and happy with life.
suggestions: Congratulations on your high level of happiness! Keep it up
Share your positive attitude and help others improve their well-being
Continue investing in meaningful activities and relationships
Maintain your gratitude and mindfulness practices
